testsuite.name: com.petstore.CucumberTestSuite

testcase.name: Full CRUD cycle for a pet

testsuite.system-out: ?[1mScenario:?[22m Full CRUD cycle for a pet ?[90m# classpath:features/pet_crud.feature:7?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mthat the user wants to manage the pet records?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.setupActor()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mthey create a new pet with name ?[1m"Pluto"?[22m and status ?[1m"available"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.createPet(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mthe pet should be successfully created?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.verifyCreation()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mthey consult the pet by its identifier?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.consultPet()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mthey should see the pet details correctly?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.verifyPetDetails()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mthey update the pet status to ?[1m"sold"?[22m?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.updatePetStatus(java.lang.String)?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mthe pet status should be updated successfully?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.verifyUpdate()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mthey delete the pet record?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.deletePet()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mthe pet record should no longer exist?[39m ?[90m# com.petstore.stepdefinitions.PetStepDefinitions.verifyDeletion()?[39m
testsuite.system-err:
